_todo_986_comment: DEFERRED, needs on-device verification before enabling (#986): (1) FILAMENT MACROS -- stock printer.cfg only defines underscore-internal _LOAD_FILAMENT / _UNLOAD_FILAMENT (there is NO public LOAD_FILAMENT/UNLOAD_FILAMENT), so HelixScreen's default load/unload buttons would call macros that don't exist on this printer. Do NOT add a default_macros block until the correct public-facing macro names (or a thin LOAD_FILAMENT wrapper around _LOAD_FILAMENT) are confirmed on hardware. (2) DISPLAY ROTATION -- the stock panel runs 480x272 rotated 180 degrees, but it is NOT yet confirmed whether HelixScreen needs display.rotate:180 on this panel; setting the wrong value would flip an already-correct display. Do NOT set display.rotate until verified on the actual unit.

calibration._comment: Known-good touch matrix from issue #123 (user R8CEH). Stopgap seed because the first-run touch-calibration math produces a bad matrix on this panel. Read at runtime from /input/calibration/*. This preset is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH (#986): the installer pre-seeds ONLY input.calibration from here into settings.json before first launch (so the touch-calibration wizard's should_skip() sees a valid matrix); the rest of this preset is applied by the app's runtime preset loader.

leds._selected_strips_comment: Pre-select the camera light so it is controllable as soon as Klipper exposes 'output_pin cameralight'.

printer._hardware_comment: Confirmed stock Klipper object names from published Sovol/R8CEH SV06 Ace configs (#986). The stock printer.cfg uses STANDARD object names ([extruder], [heater_bed], [fan], [heater_fan hotend_fan], [filament_switch_sensor filament_sensor]), which match HelixScreen's built-in defaults -- so preset-mode skipping the heater/fan auto-mapping wizard is safe on this printer.

filament_sensors._comment: Stock filament sensor is a switch-type [filament_switch_sensor filament_sensor] (confirmed #986).
